seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Israelite Bay and Jackitup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Israelite Bay vs Jackitup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Israelite Bay and Jackitup.
heading: Israelite Bay vs Jackitup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Israelite Bay, Western Australia and Jackitup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Israelite Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Jackitup (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Israelite Bay or Jackitup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Israelite Bay has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Jackitup scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Israelite Bay scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Jackitup scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Israelite Bay or Jackitup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Israelite Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
